# Privacy Policy



## 1. Introduction

BCAS-Team.github.io is a student-led educational project. This Privacy Policy outlines how we handle data when you visit our website.



## 2. No Personal Data Collection

We do **not collect, store, or share** any personally identifiable information (PII). There are no user accounts, trackers, or cookies deployed by default.



## 3. Visitor Analytics (If Any)

If analytics are used in the future, they will:

- Be privacy-respecting (e.g., self-hosted or anonymized)

- Not collect sensitive data

- Be disclosed transparently



## 4. Discord Integration

Links to our Discord server are provided. When you use Discord, their own [Privacy Policy](https://discord.com/privacy) applies.



## 5. External Links

We limit third-party links. If present, they are clearly marked, and we are not responsible for external privacy practices.



## 6. Security

We follow best practices to keep this static site secure. However, use is at your own risk, and no online platform can be 100% secure.



## 7. Changes

This Privacy Policy may be updated in the future. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the current policy.



_Last updated: June 2025_
